channel.title: OPPO Mobile Telecommunication Corp., Ltd. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by OPPO Mobile Telecommunication Corp., Ltd. (oppo).

image.title: OPPO Mobile Telecommunication Corp., Ltd. — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2026-22078 · 7.3 HIGH — O+ Connect's lack of authentication for IPC channels led to a local privilege escalation vulnerability.
item.description: Because O+ Connect's IPC service does not authenticate clients, external applications can escalate privileges and perform sensitive actions through the IPC channel.

item.title: CVE-2026-22070 · 7.1 HIGH — ColorOS Assistant Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: ColorOS Assistant has an unauthenticated start-download channel, leading to file path traversal.

item.title: CVE-2026-22077 · 5.6 MEDIUM — Sensitive Information Disclosure Vulnerability Caused by Trusted Domain Bypass in OPPO Wallet
item.description: OPPO Wallet APP contains a trusted domain validation flaw that allows attackers to bypass protected interface access restrictions, which may lead to account token hijacking and sensitive information disclosure.

item.title: CVE-2025-27389 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Application Installation Source Verification Flaw May Lead to Risk Detection Bypass
item.description: A flaw exists in the verification of application installation sources within ColorOS. Under specific conditions, this issue may cause the risk detection mechanism to fail, which could allow malicious applications to be installed without proper warnin…

item.title: CVE-2025-27388 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Arbitrary URL Loading in WebView Leading to Token Leakage Risk
item.description: Loading arbitrary external URLs through WebView components introduces malicious JS code that can steal arbitrary user tokens.

item.title: CVE-2025-27387 · 7.4 HIGH — OPPO Clone Phone uses weak WPA passphrase as only means of security
item.description: OPPO Clone Phone uses a weak password WiFi hotspot to transfer files, resulting in Information disclosure.

item.title: CVE-2024-1609 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — OPPO Store APP has a WebView component privilege escalation vulnerability.
item.description: In OPPOStore iOS App, there's a possible escalation of privilege due to improper input validation.

item.title: CVE-2024-1610 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — OPPO Store app include remote account token hijacking and sensitive information leakage
item.description: In OPPO Store APP, there's a possible escalation of privilege due to improper input validation.

item.title: CVE-2024-1608 · 9.1 CRITICAL — OPPO Usercenter Credit sdk
item.description: In OPPO Usercenter Credit SDK, there's a possible escalation of privilege due to loose permission check, This could lead to application internal information leak w/o user interaction.

item.title: CVE-2023-26311 · 7.4 HIGH — A remote code execution vulnerability in the webview component of OPPO Store app.
item.description: A remote code execution vulnerability in the webview component of OPPO Store app.

item.title: CVE-2023-26309 · 7.4 HIGH — A remote code execution vulnerability in the webview component
item.description: A remote code execution vulnerability in the webview component of OnePlus Store app.

item.title: CVE-2023-26310 · 7.4 HIGH — Command Injection In OPPO Service
item.description: There is a command injection problem in the old version of the mobile phone backup app.

item.title: CVE-2021-23247
item.description: A command injection vulerability found in quick game engine allows arbitrary remote code in quick app. Allows remote attacke0rs to gain arbitrary code execution in quick game engine

item.title: CVE-2021-23246
item.description: In ACE2 ColorOS11, the attacker can obtain the foreground package name through permission promotion, resulting in user information disclosure.

item.title: CVE-2021-23244
item.description: ColorOS pregrant dangerous permissions to apps which are listed in a whitelist xml named default-grant-permissions.But some apps in whitelist is not installed, attacker can disguise app with the same package name to obtain dangerous permission.

item.title: CVE-2021-23243
item.description: In Oppo's battery application, the third-party SDK provides the function of loading a third-party Provider, which can be used.

item.title: CVE-2020-11836
item.description: OPPO Android Phone with MTK chipset and Android 8.1/9/10/11 versions have an information leak vulnerability. The “adb shell getprop ro.vendor.aee.enforcing” or “adb shell getprop ro.vendor.aee.enforcing” return no.

item.title: CVE-2020-11835
item.description: In /SM8250_Q_Master/android/vendor/oppo_charger/oppo/charger_ic/oppo_da9313.c, failure to check the parameter buf in the function proc_work_mode_write in proc_work_mode_write causes a vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2020-11834
item.description: In /SM8250_Q_Master/android/vendor/oppo_charger/oppo/oppo_vooc.c, the function proc_fastchg_fw_update_write in proc_fastchg_fw_update_write does not check the parameter len, resulting in a vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2020-11833
item.description: In /SM8250_Q_Master/android/vendor/oppo_charger/oppo/charger_ic/oppo_mp2650.c, the function mp2650_data_log_write in mp2650_data_log_write does not check the parameter len which causes a vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2020-11832
item.description: In functions charging_limit_current_write and charging_limit_time_write in /SM8250_Q_Master/android/vendor/oppo_charger/oppo/oppo_charger.c have not checked the parameters, which causes a vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2020-11831
item.description: OvoiceManager has system permission to write vulnerability reports for arbitrary files, affected product is com.oppo.ovoicemanager V2.0.1.

item.title: CVE-2020-11830
item.description: QualityProtect has a vulnerability to execute arbitrary system commands, affected product is com.oppo.qualityprotect V2.0.

item.title: CVE-2020-11829
item.description: Dynamic loading of services in the backup and restore SDK leads to elevated privileges, affected product is com.coloros.codebook V2.0.0_5493e40_200722.

item.title: CVE-2020-11828
item.description: In ColorOS (oppo mobile phone operating system, based on AOSP frameworks/native code position/services/surfaceflinger surfaceflinger.CPP), RGB is defined on the stack but uninitialized, so when the screenShot function to RGB value assignment, will no…
